meta.title: Lesson 20: 道を教えてください — Grammar
meta.subject: japanese
meta.description: Grammar patterns for Minna no Nihongo Lesson 20: Please Tell Me the Way

items.back:
Chain directions with て-form:
まっすぐ行って、
= Go straight, then
かどを右に曲がって、
= turn right at the corner, then
はしをわたると、右手にあります。
= cross the bridge and it's on the right.

[action] + と + [result/discovery]

このみちをまっすぐ行くと、えきがあります。
= If you go straight on this road, you'll find the station.

かどを曲がると、すぐ見えます。
= When you turn the corner, you can see it right away.

Right side: みぎ / 右て (みぎて)
Left side: ひだり / 左て (ひだりて)
Straight: まっすぐ
Over there: むこう

Distance:
〜メートル先 = ~ metres ahead
〜分ぐらい = about ~ minutes (walking)

items.question: まっすぐ行っ ___ 、右に曲がってください。(Go straight, then turn right.)
items.explanation: て-form chains instructions: 行って = go (and then). て connects sequential directions.

items.question: このみちをまっすぐ行く ___ 、えきがあります。(If you go straight, there's the station.)
items.explanation: 〜と = when/if (natural sequence). 行くと = when you go. Used for directional 'when you do X, Y happens'.

items.question: えきはここから ___ ですか。(Is the station near here?)
items.explanation: ちかい = near/close. とおい = far. 〜からちかいですか = is it close from ~?

items.question: しんごうを ___ 、ひだりに曲がります。(Cross the traffic light, then turn left.)
items.explanation: わたる → わたって (て-form). を marks the thing being crossed: しんごうをわたる = cross the traffic light.

items.question: Directions: '3rd traffic light, turn right' — what is 3rd?
items.explanation: 〜つめ counts ordinal things: ひとつめ (1st), ふたつめ (2nd), みっつめ (3rd). みっつめのしんごう = the 3rd traffic light.

items.question: まっすぐ行っ ___ 、右に曲がってください。(Go straight, then turn right.)
items.explanation: て-form chains instructions: 行って = go (and then). て connects sequential directions.

items.question: このみちをまっすぐ行く ___ 、えきがあります。(If you go straight, there's the station.)
items.explanation: 〜と = when/if (natural sequence). 行くと = when you go. Used for directional 'when you do X, Y happens'.

items.question: えきはここから ___ ですか。(Is the station near here?)
items.explanation: ちかい = near/close. とおい = far. 〜からちかいですか = is it close from ~?

items.question: しんごうを ___ 、ひだりに曲がります。(Cross the traffic light, then turn left.)
items.explanation: わたる → わたって (て-form). を marks the thing being crossed: しんごうをわたる = cross the traffic light.

items.question: Directions: '3rd traffic light, turn right' — what is 3rd?
items.explanation: 〜つめ counts ordinal things: ひとつめ (1st), ふたつめ (2nd), みっつめ (3rd). みっつめのしんごう = the 3rd traffic light.
